claimText: Princeton University states that the decision to allow, limit, or prohibit generative AI in a course or in undergraduate independent work remains with the faculty; faculty members have the discretion to set their own generative AI policy for their courses.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI in Teaching and Learning Fall 2023, Faculty and Student Memo
citation.publisher: Princeton University Office of the Dean of the College
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
